zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie de Berry Duchess of Auvergne於1375年出生在法國o-阿爾培斯o阿洛迪瑟門特 德 萊昂時，她的父親Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry35歲，母親Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry29歲。她於1386年5月29日與Louis III de Châtillon de Dunois在法國崔傑布格斯結婚。她去世於1434年6月在法國o-阿爾培斯o萊昂享年59歲，埋葬在法國奧維阿利也索維尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie de Berry Duchess of Auvergne于1375年出生在法国o-阿爾培斯o阿洛迪瑟門特 德 萊昂时，她的父亲Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry35岁，母亲Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry29岁。她于1386年5月29日与Louis III de Châtillon de Dunois在法国崔傑布格斯结婚。她去世于1434年6月在法国o-阿爾培斯o萊昂享年59岁，埋葬在法国奧維阿利也索維尼。

nameMeanings.name: Berry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Béara ‘descendant of Béara’, a personal name of unexplained etymology; or, in some cases, perhaps an Anglicized form of Irish and Manx Ó Beargha. Compare Barry 1.
Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Barrie  .
English: habitational name from any of several places called in Devon named with Old English byrig, dative case of burh ‘fortified manor house, stronghold’, such as Berry Pomeroy and Berrynarbor.

variants.name: Barry
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Aidan, Ciaran, Eoin, John Patrick, Kaitlin, Kieran, Murphy, Aileen, Brigid, Caitlin.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Beargha ‘descendant of Beargh’, a byname meaning ‘plunderer’.

Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Báire ‘descendant of Báire’, a short form of either of two Gaelic personal names, Bairrfhionn or Fionnbharr, both meaning ‘fair-topped’. This may also be the source of the Manx name Barry, whose family's main seat was Ballavarry in Kirk Andreas.

variants.name: Bery
meanings: Hungarian (Béry): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Bér, in Baranya, Komárom, Nógrád, Pest, Vas, or Zala counties.

variants.name: Beery
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Béara. See Berry and O'Berry .
Americanized form of Swiss German   Bieri  .

variants.name: Berrie
meanings: (Glasgow): from Middle English or Older Scots (atte) beri ‘(at the) manor house’, see Berry .

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie de Berry Duchess of Auvergne was born in 1375, in Arrondissement de Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry, was 35 and her mother, Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry, was 29. She married Louis III de Châtillon de Dunois on 29 May 1386, in Bourges, Cher, Centre, France. She died in June 1434, in Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 59, and was buried in Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie de Berry Duchess of Auvergne est née en 1375, à Arrondissement de Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Louis III de Châtillon de Dunois le 29 mai 1386, à Bourges, Cher, Centre, France. Elle est décédée en juin 1434, à Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne, France.

de.Arrondissement de Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alp: Arrondissement de Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Marie de Berry Duchess of Auvergne 1375 in Arrondissement de Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry 35 und ihre Mutter Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry 29. Sie hat am 29. Mai 1386 in Bourges, Cher, Centre, Frankreich Louis III de Châtillon de Dunois geheiratet. Sie starb im Juni 1434 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich und wurde in Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de Berry Duchess of Auvergne è nata il nel 1375 nel Arrondissement de Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Louis III de Châtillon de Dunois il 29 maggio 1386, nel Bourges, Cher, Centre, Francia. Morì nel giugno 1434, nel Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie de Berry Duchess of Auvergneが1375年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスルhoンアロンディセメント ド リオンで生まれた時，父Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berryは35歳，母Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berryは29歳であった。1386年5月29日にフランスセントアチャーボウルジェズでLouis III de Châtillon de Dunoisと結婚した。彼女は1434年6月にフランスルhoネ-アルペスルhoンリオンで59歳で死去し，フランスアウバーグンアリールソウヴィグニーにて埋葬された。

ko.Arrondissement de Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alp: 프랑스 ho니-알프스 ho니 아론디젬트 데 리
ko.lifeSummary: Marie de Berry Duchess of Auvergne(이)가 1375년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 ho니 아론디젬트 데 리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1386년 5월 29일 프랑스 세트르 처 부르그스에서 Louis III de Châtillon de Dunois(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1434년 6월 프랑스 ho니-알프스 ho니 리에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 오버그니 앨리어 소우비그니에 묻혔다.

pt.Arrondissement de Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alp: Arrondissement de Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie de Berry Duchess of Auvergne nasceu em 1375, em Arrondissement de Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Louis III de Châtillon de Dunois em 29 de maio de 1386, em Bourges, Cher, Centre, França. Ela faleceu em junho de 1434, em Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, França, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne, França.

ru.Arrondissement de Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alp: аррондиссемент де лен, рoн, рoне-алпесь, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie de Berry Duchess of Auvergne родилась в 1375 г. в местности аррондиссемент де лен, рoн, рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Louis III de Châtillon de Dunois 29 мая 1386 г. в местности бургесь, чир, кентр, Франция. Она умерла июнь 1434 г. в местности лен, рoн, рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности соувигни, аллиир, аувиргн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie de Berry Duchess of Auvergne nació en 1375, en Arrondissement de Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Jean de Valois I, le Magnifique, Duke of Berry, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Jeanne d'Armagnac Duchesse de Berry, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Louis III de Châtillon de Dunois el 29 de mayo de 1386, en Bourges, Cher, Centre, Francia. Murió en junio de 1434, en Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Souvigny, Allier, Auvergne, Francia.
